ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the district is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "average_income" INTEGER /* Average income of the district */,
  "main_attractions" TEXT /* Main tourist attractions in the district */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the district tourism office */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the district */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the district information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitor_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the statistic belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the statistic was recorded */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month the statistic was recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistic was recorded */,
  "visitors" INTEGER /* Number of visitors for the given month and year */,
  "domestic_visitors" INTEGER /* Number of domestic visitors */,
  "international_visitors" INTEGER /* Number of international visitors */,
  "revenue_generated" INTEGER /* Revenue generated from tourism */,
  "average_spend" INTEGER /* Average amount spent by each visitor */,
  "visitor_satisfaction_score" INTEGER /* Average satisfaction score of visitors (on a scale of 1-10) */,
  "peak_time" TEXT /* Peak time of day for visitors (e.g., morning, afternoon, evening) */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event (if any) that influenced the statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitor_statistics_month FOREIGN KEY ("month") REFERENCES months ("month_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitor_statistics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitor_statistics_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitor_statistics_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district where the event is held */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event is held */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., festival, exhibition) */,
  "estimated_attendance" INTEGER /* Estimated number of attendees */,
  "actual_attendance" INTEGER /* Actual number of attendees */,
  "revenue_generated" INTEGER /* Revenue generated from the event */,
  "visitor_satisfaction_score" INTEGER /* Average satisfaction score of visitors (on a scale of 1-10) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the event organizer */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* List of sponsors */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the event information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)
column_names: Region where the district is located
Area of the district in square kilometers
Main tourist attractions in the district
Contact information for the district tourism office
Official website URL of the district
Date when the district information was last updated
ID of the district the statistic belongs to
Number of visitors for the given month and year
Average amount spent by each visitor
Average satisfaction score of visitors (on a scale of 1-10)
Peak time of day for visitors (e.g., morning, afternoon, evening)
ID of the event (if any) that influenced the statistics
ID of the district where the event is held
Average satisfaction score of visitors (on a scale of 1-10)
Date when the event information was last updated
